long_description:
[Network] Daemonset High Memory Usage is Triggered on mzone2n7

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/genctl-network-high-cpu-memory-usage.html
TIP Short Description: fabcon-manager in mzone2n7 is using over 80% of CPU limit
TIP Situation: Observed issue in service-error-Daemonset High Memory Usage
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-network-genctl:::mzone2n7::

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    max(avg_over_time(sysdig_container_memory_limit_used_percent{container_name=~"fabcon-manager|fabcon-edge-manager", kube_pod_name!=""}[10m])) by (kube_cluster_name,kube_node_name,kube_pod_name)>80 = 80.0001
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone2n7' and kube_node_name = 'osa1-qz1-sr1-rk171-s02' and kube_pod_name = 'fabcon-manager-sczcd'

Time:             12/08/2025 02:10 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://jp-osa.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/ee162ec9-ba7d-4c3e-b399-7cb2badb0efb?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F11572513%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [Network] Daemonset High Memory Usage
Description:  [Network] microservices are using over 80% of the memory limit - GENCTL-NETWORK
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   max(avg_over_time(sysdig_container_memory_limit_used_percent{container_name=~"fabcon-manager|fabcon-edge-manager", kube_pod_name!=""}[10m])) by (kube_cluster_name,kube_node_name,kube_pod_name)>80
Duration: 10 m
Alert URL:    https://jp-osa.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/ee162ec9-ba7d-4c3e-b399-7cb2badb0efb?redirectRoute=%2Falerts%2Frules%3FalertId%3D213845
